mapper.select: SELECT lr.*, e1.name AS emp_name, e2.name AS approver_name FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN employee e1 ON lr.emp_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN employee e2 ON lr.approver_id = e2.id WHERE lr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_request (emp_id, leave_type, start_date, end_date, days, reason, status) VALUES (#{empId}, #{leaveType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{days}, #{reason}, '待审批')
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_request SET status = #{status}, approver_id = #{approverId}, approve_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = '待审批'
UPDATE leave_request SET status = '已撤销' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = '待审批'
